arts.ttl: Top makes clear Ruud van Nistelrooy mission as Man United legend named new Leicester City boss
arts.sum: Leicester City chairman, Aiyawatt “Top” Srivaddhanaprabha is expecting great things of new manager Ruud van Nistelrooy . And outlining his expectations of the new man, the chairman told the club website : “It is my pleasure to welcome Ruud to Leicester City .

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy reveals how Enzo Maresca influenced his Leicester City manager decision
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca helped sell Leicester City to Ruud van Nistelrooy with the new manager consulting his former team-mate before taking the job. Maresca and Van Nistelrooy played together at Malaga over a decade ago and have remained in touch, with the club’s Championship-winning manager able to provide details on life at the King Power Stadium.

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy appointed as new Leicester manager
arts.sum: Former Manchester United forward Ruud van Nistelrooy has been appointed as head coach of Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy appointed Leicester manager
arts.sum: The former Manchester United striker has signed a deal until 2027.

arts.ttl: Leicester confirm appointment of Ruud van Nistelrooy as manager
arts.sum: He replaces Steve Cooper on deal to 2027 with club 16th First game will be on Tuesday not Brentford on Saturday Ruud van Nistelrooy has been confirmed as the manager of Leicester on a contract to June 2027, less than three weeks after he left Manchester United, but will not take charge of Saturday’s game at Brentford. Van Nistelrooy will be in the stands there and the first-team coach, Ben Dawson, will be in the dugout, supported by the coaches Danny Alcock and Andy Hughes. Van Nistelrooy will be presented by Leicester on Monday and his first game will be at home to West Ham on Tuesday. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Leicester confirm appointment of former Man Utd interim manager
arts.sum: Former Man Utd striker Ruud van Nistelrooy has been appointed Leicester's new manager.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy confirmed as new Leicester manager
arts.sum: The Dutch coach spent four games in charge of Manchester United on an interim basis before Ruben Amorim was installed as the successor to Erik ten Hag

arts.ttl: Breaking: Leicester City confirm Ruud van Nistelrooy as new manager
arts.sum: For Van Nistelrooy, his debut as the club's manager will be next Tuesday night, when City host fellow bottom-half side West Ham at the King Power Stadium. Ben Dawson, Andrew Hughes and Danny Alcock, who were part of Cooper's staff, have been preparing the players since Tuesday and will be taking charge for the fixture in west London.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy is appointed Leicester's new manager less than three weeks after leaving Man United - with the Dutchman set to watch Brentford clash from the stands
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: Ruud van Nistelrooy will watch Leicester's clash with Brentford from the stands after signing a contract until 2027 to manage the Premier League strugglers.

arts.ttl: Brentford v Leicester: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Brentford v Leicester: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.
